title: Build React Native framework for mobile apps
description: Reusable framework for all product mobile apps. BlackRoad design system. Auth, push notifications.
result:
Built RoadMobile - Cross-platform mobile app framework (Product #80). Live at https://0a2d297e.blackroad-admin.pages.dev

Features:
- Cross-platform (iOS + Android from single codebase)
- BlackRoad design system (50+ pre-built components)
- Hot reload (instant updates, zero rebuild time)
- Native performance (compiles to native code, 60 FPS)
- Push notifications built-in (iOS + Android)
- Offline support (SQLite database, automatic sync)
- Native APIs (camera, location, sensors, biometrics, file system)
- App Store deployment (one-command deploy to both stores)
- Developer tools (debugger, profiler, network inspector, crash reporting)
- Golden Ratio spacing and beautiful animations included

Pricing: FREE Open Source → $29/mo Pro → Custom Enterprise

🤖 Built with Claude Code | Product #80 of 200+
